reasoning: Zootopia 2 releases on Wednesday, November 26, 2025, for the Thanksgiving holiday. As a Wednesday release, a large portion of its opening demand will be absorbed on Wednesday and Thursday. The resolution criteria specifically state that only the Friday-Sunday 3-day opening weekend will be counted. Currently, "A Minecraft Movie" holds the highest 2025 domestic opening weekend with $162.7 million, followed by "Lilo & Stitch" at $146 million. The all-time record for a Thanksgiving 3-day portion is Moana 2's $139.8M. Current 6-week tracking places Zootopia 2's 3-day opening weekend in the $115M to $130M range, which is far below Minecraft's $162.7 million. There is virtually no chance Zootopia 2 can close this gap over just the Friday-Sunday period after a Wednesday launch. Therefore, it will almost certainly not have the highest 3-day opening weekend of 2025.
